raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting a causal or expressive link between mental states and physical health as a piece of proverbial wisdom or warning",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Thoughts can be classified as 'sickly' (unhealthy/negative)",
    "Mental states directly manifest in or cause bodily illness",
    "The mind-body relationship is primarily unidirectional and expressive"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a metaphorical claim but relies on an oversimplified deterministic causal model",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Psychosomatic influences are significant, the statement encourages beneficial mental habits, and it is not treated as excluding other medical factors",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Taken literally as the primary or sole cause of illness, promoting victim-blaming or discouraging evidence-based medical treatment"
}
